title: SessionNotesSheet — Session-Level Notes Editor
problem: A band may want to capture session-level context — 'rehearsal at Marco's place, trying the new bridge section' — that doesn't belong on any individual clip. Session notes give the band a shared scratchpad for each jam night.
analysis: SessionNotesSheet is a BottomSheet that opens from a 'Notes' action on the session list card (or session header). Contains a multi-line textarea (no character limit shown, but reasonable max ~1000ch enforced on input). Save: PATCH /api/sessions/[sessionId] { notes: text }. Cancel: dismisses without saving. Notes are displayed as a 1-line preview on the Session List card (truncated).
successCriteria:
- BottomSheet opens with current session notes pre-filled in textarea
- Multi-line textarea, vertical resize, min-height 4 lines
- Save: PATCH to Postgres, sheet dismisses, session card preview updates
- Cancel: discards changes, sheet dismisses
- Empty notes: allowed (blanks the notes field)
- Loading state on Save button while PATCH in-flight
implementation: components/sessions/SessionNotesSheet.tsx: props { open, onClose, sessionId, initialNotes }. Internal state: notes (string), saving (bool). Textarea with defaultValue=initialNotes. Save: PATCH → onClose(). Cancel: onClose() directly. No character counter (notes are low-frequency).
knownLimitations: Notes field is not collaborative — last save wins (no conflict resolution for simultaneous edits)
userGuide: Tap the notes icon on a session to add shared notes for the whole band — 'great energy on song 3', 'fix the chorus next time'. Notes are visible to everyone in the band.
